backstory.original: A former archaeologist turned adventurer, Kentucky 'Kent' Jones honed his skills exploring a temple of Talona, goddess of poison and plague. While his team didn't survive the temple's defenses, he returned home to the lakeside town of Caradoon. Still a flamboyant Tiefling, Kent carries a darkness that he does his best to keep hidden. But he doesn't bear the darkness alone. After returning to Caradoon, he met smart and PATIENT Aasimar, Virgil. Together they've flourished, even after accidentally poisoning the ground under a local tavern in an effort to get rid of a few rats and fleeing Caradoon only to meet up with Selise Astorio and join the Rivals.
backstory.display: 前考古学家，现在是冒险者，肯塔基“肯特”琼斯在探索塔洛娜（毒药和瘟疫女神）的神殿时磨炼了自己的能力。尽管他所在的队伍未能在神殿的防御中幸存，但他却能安全回到自己的家乡 - 湖畔小镇卡拉敦。尽管还是个欢脱的提夫林，但肯特却背负着自己竭尽全力隐藏的黑暗面。但他并非独立承受。在回到卡拉敦后，肯特预见了智慧，更重要是拥有耐心的神裔 - 维吉尔。他们在一起，相互帮助，取得成绩 - 即便只是因为想要解决一些老鼠而意外将当地酒馆所在的土地变得有毒，从而逃离卡拉敦，一心只想去见赛丽斯·阿斯托里奥并加入对手团。

description.original: Kent strikes the closest enemy with his rapier.
description.display: 肯特用自己的西洋剑刺击最近的敌人。

description.original: For 30 seconds, when Kent attacks, a ghostly spirit attacks an enemy dealing BUD damage.
description.display: 30 秒内，肯特攻击时，一个幽魂攻击一名敌人，造成基础杀招伤害。

longDescription.original: The weather changes to fog. For 30 seconds, whenever Kent attacks, a ghostly spirit is summoned and attacks an additional enemy if possible dealing BUD damage.
longDescription.display: 天气改变为雾天。30 秒内，肯特攻击时召唤一个幽魂，攻击额外一个敌人（如可能），造成基础杀招伤害。

description.original: Kent buffs all Champions based on the highest level boss he helped defeat in each Campaign.
description.display: 基于自己在每场战役中协助击败的最高等级首领，肯特为所有勇士提供增益。

description.original: Kent gets nostalgic each time he or his spirit companions attack, helping him deal more damage until he moves on.
description.display: 每次肯特自身或他的幽魂伙伴攻击时，肯特都会获得怀想，帮助他在摆脱过去之前造成更多伤害。

description.desc: If Virgil qualifies for an adventure restriction based on his tags, age, ability scores, etc., $(source_hero) may be used as well.
如果维吉尔根据自己的标签、年龄、技能分数等通过冒险的限制，则$(source_hero)也可以一并使用。

description.pre: $(source_hero) keeps a soul trinket of the highest level boss defeated in each campaign (and the highest level boss defeated in all events) where he was present. $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in his column by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Soul Trinket level.
$(source_hero)持有自己出场的每场战役中击败的最高等级首领（以及所有活动中击败的最高等级首领）的灵魂吊坠。灵魂吊坠每个等级可提升$(source_hero)所在列中的所有勇士伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%。

tipText.original: Kent keeps a Soul Token from the highest level boss he helped defeat in each campaign.  These tokens buff the party.
tipText.display: 在每场战役中，肯特会留下协助击败的最高等级首领的灵魂之证。这些证明可为探险队提供增益。

description.desc: Each time $(source_hero) or the ghostly spirit from his ultimate attacks, he gains a Nostalgia stack that lasts until entering a new area. $(source_hero) increases his damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Nostalgia stack, stacking multiplicatively and then applied multiplicatively. Buffs are applied to the post-stack value, and Nostalgia stacks are capped at $(max_stacks) stacks.
$(source_hero)或其杀招攻击产生的幽魂攻击时，都会获得一层怀想堆叠，一直持续到进入新区域为止。每有一层怀想堆叠，$(source_hero)的伤害增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，堆叠和应用均为乘算。增益应用于堆叠后的值，且怀想堆叠上限为 $(max_stacks) 层。

tipText.original: Each time Kent or his ghostly companions attack he gains Nostalgia making him deal even more damage until changing areas.
tipText.display: 肯特及其幽魂伙伴每次攻击都会获得怀想，令肯特在改变区域前造成更多的伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s force of personality emboldens his companions. $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions by your current Achievement bonus.
$(source_hero)的个性力量令伙伴变得更加莽撞。$(source_hero)根据你的当前成就加成增加所有勇士的伤害。
$(source_hero) increases the attack bonus of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)% for each Rivals of Waterdeep Champion, stacking multiplicatively and applied multiplicatively.
阵型中的每个“深水城的竞争对手”勇士均使$(source_hero)的“$(upgrade_name id)”攻击加成提高 $(amount)%，以乘算堆叠并应用。

specializationDescription.original: Kent focuses on improving his Tokens of the Departed
specializationDescription.display: 肯特专注于改进自己的逝去之证

description.desc: Whenever $(source_hero) attacks an enemy and doesn't kill it, it is affected by a virulent poison. The poison deals $(seconds_of_bud) seconds worth of BUD to the enemy each second for $(total_seconds) seconds.
$(source_hero)攻击敌人但未将敌人击杀时，该敌人会受到恶性毒药的影响。毒素对敌人造成等同 $(seconds_of_bud) 秒的基础杀招伤害，持续 $(total_seconds) 秒。

specializationDescription.display: 肯特为自己的西洋剑淬上了毒

description.original: Not really my thing, but I'll try it...
description.display: 我不算喜欢，但我会试试看...

description.original: Have at thee!
description.display: 看招！

description.original: WAIT! I have a hat for this!
description.display: 等等！我有顶帽子专门弄这个的！

description.original: Now you're in for it!
description.display: 现在你得付出代价！

description.original: DON'T STAIN MY CLOAK!
description.display: 不要弄脏我的斗篷！

description.original: Buy me a drink first!
description.display: 先给我买份饮料来！

description.original: It's a bit macabre - but it's a vibe!
description.display: 有点可怕 - 但就是这种感觉！

description.original: You'll be surprised at how quickly they run out.
description.display: 消耗速度之快，定会让你大为震惊。

description.original: This one is special.
description.display: 这个是特别的。

description.original: These ruins are SINGING! The stories they can tell us!
description.display: 这些遗迹在歌唱！它们可以告诉我们故事！

description.original: That was MAGNIFICENT!
description.display: 真是太棒了！

description.original: YAAAAAAAAAAS!
description.display: 太·好·了！

description.original: Sometimes I have to remember those we lost in order to be stronger.
description.display: 有时候，只有记住曾经失去的人才能使我们变得更强大。

description.original: It's not my style, but I can make it work.
description.display: 虽然不是我的风格，但能凑合。

description.original: I am, aren't I?!
description.display: 我就是，对吧？！

description.original: We are stronger together.
description.display: 人多力量大。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

character_sheet_details.backstory: A former archaeologist turned adventurer, Kentucky 'Kent' Jones honed his skills exploring a temple of Talona, goddess of poison and plague. While his team didn't survive the temple's defenses, he returned home to the lakeside town of Caradoon. Still a flamboyant Tiefling, Kent carries a darkness that he does his best to keep hidden. But he doesn't bear the darkness alone. After returning to Caradoon, he met smart and PATIENT Aasimar, Virgil. Together they've flourished, even after accidentally poisoning the ground under a local tavern in an effort to get rid of a few rats and fleeing Caradoon only to meet up with Selise Astorio and join the Rivals.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Kent is a Support DPS champion that buffs the party based on the hardest bosses they have helped defeat.

event_upgrades.name: Tokens of the Departed
event_upgrades.description: Kent buffs all Champions based on the highest level boss he helped defeat in each Campaign.

event_upgrades.name: Remembering the Old Days
event_upgrades.description: Kent gets nostalgic each time he or his spirit companions attack, helping him deal more damage until he moves on.
